title: Preparations and Discussions of Quraysh
description: Khufaf b. Ayma' b. Rahdah al-Ghifari, or his father Ayma' b. Rahdah9° sent his son with a present of some slaughter-camels to Quraysh, as they passed by him, and added, "If you would like me to reinforce you with arms and fighting men, I will do so." They sent a message back to him by his son, saying, "You have discharged the duties of kinship and done what was incumbent upon you. By my life, if we are fighting against men, we are not too

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 07
